# Soft9 Tool450 Grep25 Contract

## Soft 9
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.09 with quality bias floor 0.07 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Tool 450
tool result budgets default to 450 chars with 6-char previews for denser reclaim

## Grep 25
Grep head defaults to 25 lines for denser search results

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool/grep/status/footer vitest
